name: DST_223_01_AYRINTILI_BORCTAKIP_320
definition:
--USE [TIGER3]
--GO

--/****** Object:  View [dbo].[DST_223_01_AYRINTILI_BORCTAKIP_320]    Script Date: 15.08.2023 11:00:01 ******/
--SET ANSI_NULLS ON
--GO

--SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
--GO




CREATE   VIEW [dbo].[DST_223_01_AYRINTILI_BORCTAKIP_320] AS 

SELECT 



CARI,[Cari Adı],Cari_Kodu,VADE,ISLEM_TARIHI,ISLEMNO,ISLEM,GUN,TUTAR_BORC,TUTAR_ALACAK,BAKIYE,DOVIZ,KUR


FROM

(


SELECT 
*,

SUM(T.TUTAR_BORC + T.TUTAR_ALACAK) OVER (ORDER BY RowId ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS BAKIYE
,DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), cast(VADE as date)) GUN
--SUM(T.TUTAR_BORC + T.TUTAR_ALACAK) OVER (ORDER BY RowId ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS BAKIYE

FROM

(



SELECT    
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), PYT.DATE_) ASC) AS RowId,
--CLC.CARDTYPE AS Grup,

CLC.CODE AS [Cari_Kodu], 
CLC.DEFINITION_ AS [Cari Adı],
CLC.CODE  + ' / ' + CLC.DEFINITION_ CARI,


CASE WHEN PYT.MODULENR = 5 THEN PYT.DATE_ ELSE

(SELECT TOP 1 DATEADD(day,CAST(SUBSTRING(DAY_,1,50)AS INT),INVOICE.DATE_)   
FROM LG_223_PAYLINES WHERE PAYPLANREF=INVOICE.PAYDEFREF) END AS VADE,


--PYT.DATE_ AS [VADE],
PYT.PROCDATE AS [ISLEM_TARIHI],
     CASE WHEN MODULENR = 4 THEN
                          (SELECT     FICHENO
                            FROM          LG_223_01_INVOICE INV
                            WHERE      INV.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) WHEN MODULENR = 5 THEN
                          (SELECT     CLF.TRANNO
                            FROM          LG_223_01_CLFLINE CLF
                            WHERE      CLF.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) WHEN MODULENR = 10 THEN
                          (SELECT     KSL.FICHENO
                            FROM          LG_223_01_KSLINES KSL
                            WHERE      KSL.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) WHEN MODULENR = 7 THEN
                          (SELECT     BNF.TRANNO
                            FROM          LG_223_01_BNFLINE BNF
                            WHERE      BNF.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) WHEN MODULENR = 6 THEN
                          (SELECT     CSR.ROLLNO
                           FROM          LG_223_01_CSROLL CSR
                            WHERE      CSR.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) ELSE 'Tanımsız' END AS [ISLEMNO],

 CASE WHEN PYT.MODULENR = 5 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 14 THEN 'Açılış' WHEN MODULENR = 5 AND PYT.TRCODE = 3 THEN 'Borç Dekontu' WHEN MODULENR = 5 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 4 THEN 'Alacak Dekontu' WHEN MODULENR = 5 AND PYT.TRCODE = 5 THEN 'Virman' WHEN MODULENR = 4 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 8 THEN 'Toptan Satış' WHEN MODULENR = 4 AND PYT.TRCODE = 1 THEN 'Mal Alım Faturası' WHEN MODULENR = 4 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 4 THEN 'Alınan Hizmet Faturası' WHEN MODULENR = 4 AND PYT.TRCODE = 9 THEN 'Verilen Hizmet' WHEN MODULENR = 4 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 3 THEN 'Satış İade' WHEN MODULENR = 4 AND PYT.TRCODE = 6 THEN 'Alım İade' WHEN MODULENR = 7 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 3 THEN 'Gelen Havale' WHEN MODULENR = 7 AND PYT.TRCODE = 4 THEN 'Gönderilen Havale' WHEN MODULENR = 6 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 1 THEN 'Çek Girişi' WHEN MODULENR = 6 AND PYT.TRCODE = 2 THEN 'Senet Girişi' WHEN MODULENR = 6 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 3 THEN 'Çek Çıkışı' WHEN MODULENR = 6 AND PYT.TRCODE = 4 THEN 'Senet Çıkışı' WHEN MODULENR = 10 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 1 THEN 'Nakit Tahsilat' WHEN MODULENR = 10 AND PYT.TRCODE = 2 THEN 'Nakit Ödeme' WHEN MODULENR = 3 AND 
                      PYT.TRCODE = 1 THEN 'Satış Siparişi' WHEN MODULENR = 61 AND PYT.TRCODE = 3 THEN 'Borç Dekontu' ELSE 'Tanımsız' END AS [ISLEM],

					 -- DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), cast(PYT.DATE_ as date)) GUN,







					  CASE
               WHEN PYT.SIGN = 0 THEN
                   CASE WHEN PYT.TRRATE > 1 THEN (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1) * PYT.TRRATE ELSE (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) 
                      * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1) END
               ELSE
                   0
           END TUTAR_BORC,

		     CASE
               WHEN PYT.SIGN = 1 THEN
                   (CASE WHEN PYT.TRRATE > 1 THEN (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1)  ELSE (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) 
                      * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1) END) * 1
               ELSE
                   0
           END TUTAR_ALACAK,
					    



                          --(SELECT     SUM(DEBIT - CREDIT) AS Expr1
                          --  FROM          dbo.LV_223_01_CLTOTFIL AS CLT
                          --  WHERE      (CARDREF = CLC.LOGICALREF) AND (TOTTYP = 1)) AS CariBakiyeTL, 
							
							
							--CASE WHEN ABS(ROUND
       --                   ((SELECT     SUM(CLT.DEBIT - CLT.CREDIT)
       --                       FROM         LV_223_01_CLTOTFIL CLT
       --                       WHERE     CLT.CARDREF = CLC.LOGICALREF AND CLT.TOTTYP = 1), 2)) > 1 THEN 'Bakiye Verenler' ELSE 'Bakiye Vermeyenler' END AS [Bakiye Bilgisi], 
       --               CASE WHEN
       --                   (SELECT     SUM(CLT.DEBIT - CLT.CREDIT)
       --                     FROM          LV_223_01_CLTOTFIL CLT
       --                     WHERE      CLT.CARDREF = CLC.LOGICALREF AND CLT.TOTTYP = 1) > 0 THEN 'Borç Bakiye' ELSE 'Alacak Bakiye' END AS [Bakiye B-A], 
       --                     CASE WHEN GETDATE()< PYT.DATE_ THEN 'Vadesi Gelmeyen' ELSE 'Vadesi Geçen' END AS [Vade Bilgisi], 
                             
                        
                      
                      
                      CASE PYT.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' WHEN 1 THEN 'USD' WHEN 20 THEN 'EUR' WHEN 17 THEN 'GBP' WHEN 59 THEN 'BAE' ELSE 'Tanımsız' END AS DOVIZ,
					  PYT.TRRATE KUR
                      
                      --(PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) * (PYT.SIGN * - 2 + 1) AS Tutar, 
					  --CASE PYT.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN (CASE WHEN PYT.TRCURR IN (0,160) AND PYT.TRRATE IN (0,1) THEN  PYT.TOTAL  ELSE 0 END) ELSE (CASE WHEN PYT.TRCURR IN (0,160) AND PYT.TRRATE IN (0,1) THEN  PYT.TOTAL  ELSE 0 END) * -1 END   [Tutar],
                      
                      --CASE 
                      --WHEN PYT.TRCURR=0 THEN (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1)  
                      --ELSE (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1) * TRRATE END Tutar_TRY,
                      --CASE 
                      --WHEN PYT.TRCURR=1 THEN (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1)  
                      --ELSE 0 END Tutar_USD,
                      --CASE 
                      --WHEN PYT.TRCURR=20 THEN (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1)  
                      --ELSE 0 END Tutar_EUR,
                      
                      
                      --CASE WHEN TRRATE > 1 THEN (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) * ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1) * TRRATE ELSE (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID) 
                      --* ((PYT.SIGN * - 2) + 1) END AS Tutar_TL, 
                      
                      --CASE PYT.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN 'Borç' ELSE 'Alacak' END AS Hareket
                     
                 
					  
					  ---CASE WHEN MODULENR = 4 THEN
                      --    (SELECT     GENEXP1 + '-' + GENEXP2
                      --      FROM          LG_223_01_INVOICE INV
                      --      WHERE      INV.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) WHEN MODULENR = 5 THEN
                      --    (SELECT     CLF.LINEEXP
                      --      FROM          LG_223_01_CLFLINE CLF
                      --      WHERE      CLF.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) WHEN MODULENR = 10 THEN
                      --    (SELECT     KSL.LINEEXP
                      --      FROM          LG_223_01_KSLINES KSL
                      --      WHERE      KSL.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) WHEN MODULENR = 7 THEN
                      --    (SELECT     BNF.LINEEXP
                      --      FROM          LG_223_01_BNFLINE BNF
                      --      WHERE      BNF.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF) ELSE '' END AS Açıklama,

--TRGP.GDEF [TIC ISLM GRP]
FROM   dbo.LG_223_01_PAYTRANS AS PYT 
LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.LG_223_CLCARD AS CLC ON PYT.CARDREF = CLC.LOGICALREF

LEFT JOIN dbo.LG_223_01_INVOICE INVOICE
            ON INVOICE.LOGICALREF = PYT.FICHEREF

WHERE   (PYT.CANCELLED = 0) AND (PYT.TOTAL - PYT.PAID > 0) AND (PYT.PAIDINCASH = 0) AND (PYT.CARDREF > 0) AND PYT.SIGN IN (1,0)
AND ((PYT.MODULENR = 5 AND PYT.TRCODE IN( 5,4,14)) OR  (PYT.MODULENR = 4 AND PYT.TRCODE IN( 1,4,6)))
and CLC.CODE LIKE '320%' --AND CLC.CODE='320.KILIÇ'
)T WHERE YEAR(T.[ISLEM_TARIHI])>2021 
) as TA

WHERE  Cari_Kodu + '-' + DOVIZ NOT IN ('320.01.00001-TL','320.01.00467-TL','320.01.00074-TL','320.01.00150-TL','320.01.00453-TL') 
---AND Cari_Kodu='320.YALIN'

sample_data.CARI: 320.SOLMAZ - EU / SOLMAZ GÜMRÜK MÜŞAVİRLİĞİ ANONİM ŞİRKETİ
320.RESTAR - EU / RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.
sample_data.Cari Adı: RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.

sample_data.CARI: 320.RESTAR - EU / RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.
sample_data.Cari Adı: RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.

sample_data.CARI: 320.RESTAR - EU / RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.
sample_data.Cari Adı: RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.

sample_data.CARI: 320.RESTAR - EU / RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.
sample_data.Cari Adı: RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.

sample_data.CARI: 320.RESTAR - EU / RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.
sample_data.Cari Adı: RESTAR OTOMOBİL TURZ.İÇ ve DIŞ TİC. A.Ş.
